_comment: Beautifly/Dustox 'Bug Spread' — RS/SS/DR mono-Grass Stage 2 status/heal-tank deck. Wurmple (RS_78) Signs of Evolution searches both halves of its own line; Beautifly heals 10 from each of your Pokémon while hitting for 50; Dustox locks the active in double-poison (20/turn between turns) and Gusts for 50. Supported by a Nincada→Ninjask line: Nincada's Poison Breath chains with Dustox Toxic, and Ninjask's Quick Touch attacks for 30 while moving any number of Grass Energy to the next active when it pivots — perfect for powering up a benched Beautifly/Dustox. Heavy basic-search package (Poké Ball, Lanette's, Birch) ensures fast Wurmple drops.
